creator: Food In 5 | Bill
source_text:
Protein loaded sweet potato boats 🍠 

Comment ‘recipe’ and I’ll send you a link to where you can find the full recipe 🙏

Macros per boat 💪 
54g protein
18g fat
52g carbs 

580 calories per boat 🤤 

Ingredients for 2 sweet potato boats 🛶 
handful Spinach
3 Garlic clove
1/2 Red onion
2 Large sweet potato
400g Beef mince
100g Light mozzarella
2 tbsp Italian mixed herbs
1 tbsp Chilli powder
2 tbsp Paprika
4 tbsp Tomato paste

Air Fryer: 190°C (375°F) for 40-45 minutes, turning halfway.
Oven: 200°C (400°F) for 50-60 minutes, flipping halfway.

#highprotein #easyrecipes #lunchideas #healthyfood #gymfood

expected.name: Protein loaded sweet potato boats
steps: Air Fryer: 190°C (375°F) for 40-45 minutes, turning halfway.

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
The appliance temperature/time lines are the only supported cooking instructions in the description.
Accepted after general ingredient-yield heading and appliance-direction signals, while preserving slow-cooker timing as metadata; no creator identity or exact recipe phrase is used.
